# Request Metadata

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/lockingdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Locking / Lease SSOT](../locking.md)

When the task DB source claims a task, it writes the following values into bridge.TaskRequest.Metadata.

| key | meaning |
| --- | --- |
| runtime_lease_id | local lease sidecar lease_id |
| runtime_fencing_token | task-scoped monotonic fencing token |
| runtime_capability_fingerprint | capability fingerprint used by the C5 selector |

The supervisor extracts these values into a typed report context and passes them through StartTask, ReportEvent, and CompleteTask.

The task DB reporter compares runtime_lease_id, runtime_fencing_token, and runtime_capability_fingerprint with the current active sidecar lease. Missing or mismatched values reject progress mutation.
